description:
Split joyride into 4 workspace crates (joyride-config, joyride-core, joyride-ui, joyride binary) and add comprehensive tests. See plan for details.

```mermaid
graph LR
    1[Add tests to single-crate] --> 2[Create workspace skeleton]
    2 --> 3[Move config crate]
    3 --> 4[Move core crate]
    4 --> 5[Move UI crate]
    5 --> 6[Clean up binary]
    6 --> 7[Update Nix]
    7 --> 8[Add remaining tests]
```
title: Workspace split + comprehensive tests
